title: L4J
description: Recreation and adaptation of the beloved Legacy 4J console edition of Minecraft. Based on the Legacy4J mod.
body:
L4J Modpack is a recreation of the discontinued console edition of Minecraft, developed by 4J studios from 2009 to 2019, adapted and improved with various quality of life and performance mods.

## Main gameplay features :

### Legacy4J

This modpack is centered around the Legacy4J mod, which completely changes the user interface, gameplay mechanics, sounds and graphics to be similar if not identical to what console edition Minecraft had.
- All UIs and menus now use console sounds and style
- Attack cooldown removed
- Gamma settings
- Old textures (Non legacy edition blocks, such as warped nylium, will not be adapted and will require a programmer art style resource pack, non included here.)
- Elytra camera roll
All of these features can be disabled in the mod config.

Legacy4J also comes with full controller support, no need to install Controlify, i experienced compatibility issues when both mods were used.

### MiniMega

MiniMega is a mod for Legacy4J that adds the 2016 minigames in the title screen. It is currently being developed, with Lobby and Glide being fully implemented and other minigames being worked on.
Not all maps are present in the Glide minigame, but the classic/free ones are fully operational.

/!\ The mod creates a world, do not open it, the game can crash.

### Mash-up packs

Mash-up packs were massive packs including skins (you can equip them thanks to the **Legacy Skins** mod), the resource pack itself, worlds (you can create and explore them thanks to the **Legacy Worlds** mod), and Glide maps.


## Main quality of life features :

I've added some popular mods to make the experience more pleasant and suitable to more people. Here is a list of the most impactful ones.
- Appleskin (information about food, better hud)
- uku's QoL mods, like the armor hud and potion counter
- SimpleHUD, a non obstrusive mod displaying FPS, ping and more
- e4mc, allowing players to host worlds like in console edition (use at your own risk)
- Clean F3
- Clear lava, water and powder snow
- client time mods, allowing you to see the time of the day and control it (only rendering, will not affect the actual time)
- Chat utils, such as chat patches, chat heads, and no chat reports, mods that allow you to have an extended chat with additional info, player heads display, and a protection against message reporting (will display a warning in unsafe servers)
- Mouse Tweaks


## Rendering, graphics :

Here are the mods i added to tweak minecraft a bit more and make it more flexible :
- Distant horizons (You may not find the options while Legacy4J UI changes are active)
- Iris shaders
- OptiBoxes (equivalent to optifine, allows you to use custom skyboxes)
- No darkness effect (I hate the warden)
- Model Gap Fix (Fixes the gaps in some item models)


## Performance :

This modpack used Fabulously Optimized as its base to provide a nicer experience on lower end hardware.



/!\ The modpack isnt very stable and can crash by simply adding a resource pack.
